name: JokeAPI_get_jokes
description: Get random jokes from JokeAPI v2, a free REST API serving jokes in multiple categories. Returns jokes in 'single' format (one-liner) or 'twopart' format (setup + delivery). Supports filtering by category (Programming, Misc, Dark, Pun, Spooky, Christmas), content flags to exclude (nsfw, religious, political, racist, sexist, explicit), and number of jokes (1-10). Useful for humor generation, chatbot personality, educational demonstrations of REST APIs, and entertainment applications. All jokes are in English by default.

category.description: Joke category filter. Options: 'Any' (default, all categories), 'Programming', 'Misc', 'Dark', 'Pun', 'Spooky', 'Christmas'. Can combine with comma: 'Programming,Pun'

amount.description: Number of jokes to return (1-10). Default is 1. When amount > 1, response contains a 'jokes' array.

type.description: Joke format filter. Options: 'single' (one-liner jokes only), 'twopart' (setup + delivery jokes only). Leave null for both types.

blacklistFlags.description: Comma-separated content flags to exclude. Options: 'nsfw', 'religious', 'political', 'racist', 'sexist', 'explicit'. Example: 'nsfw,racist,sexist'

safe-mode.description: Set to any value (e.g., '') to enable safe mode, which is equivalent to blacklisting all flags. Overrides blacklistFlags.

data.description: JokeAPI response. When amount=1: contains a single joke object directly. When amount>1: contains a 'jokes' array.

error.description: Whether an API error occurred (false on success)

amount.description: Number of jokes returned (present when amount > 1)

jokes.description: Array of joke objects (present when amount > 1)

category.description: Joke category (Programming, Misc, Dark, Pun, Spooky, Christmas)

joke.description: The joke text (present for 'single' type jokes)

setup.description: The joke setup/question (present for 'twopart' type jokes)

delivery.description: The joke punchline/answer (present for 'twopart' type jokes)

flags.description: Content flags (nsfw, religious, political, racist, sexist, explicit)

safe.description: Whether the joke is considered safe/clean

category.description: Joke category (present for single joke response)

type.description: Joke format (present for single joke response)

joke.description: Joke text for single-type joke (present for single joke response)

setup.description: Setup for twopart-type joke (present for single joke response)

delivery.description: Delivery for twopart-type joke (present for single joke response)
